_comment: arrtop configuration (JSON). Same shape as config.example.yaml. Resolve it via ./config.json, --config <path>, or ARR_TOP_CONFIG. type is sonarr|radarr (lowercase). refresh (optional) sets the TUI redraw interval as <int>s / <int>ms / a bare integer of seconds; default 2s. download_clients (optional) lets arrtop query a download client (qbittorrent) for exact per-episode sizes; omit it to keep the pack-average estimate. Each client's name must match the download-client name the *arr reports on a queue row.
